items.headline: 3 things to watch in Pistons-Magic Game 3
items.description: The Magic must rebound from a rough 3rd quarter, limit Cade Cunningham and find comfort in returning home for Game 3.

items.headline: Spurs' Victor Wembanyama unavailable for Game 3 against Portland while recovering from concussion
items.description: The Spurs say Victor Wembanyama is not available for Friday night’s Game 3 against Portland in their 1st-round playoff series.
items.byline: ANNE M. PETERSON | The Associated Press

items.headline: Raptors' Immanuel Quickley to miss the rest of 1st-round series vs. Cavs after aggravating strained hamstring
items.description: Raptors G Immanuel Quickley has aggravated his strained right hamstring and will not be available vs. Cleveland.

items.headline: Rockets' Kevin Durant out for Game 3 vs. Lakers with a sprained left ankle
items.description: Kevin Durant won’t play in Game 3 of Houston’s first-round series against the Lakers on Friday because of a sprained left ankle.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Lakers-Rockets Game 3 leaves Houston on the brink of elimination
items.description: LeBron James turns in a vintage performance and Marcus Smart makes play after play as L.A. stakes a 3-0 series lead.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Celtics-76ers Game 3 ends with Jayson Tatum dagger as Boston reclaims homecourt
items.description: The 3-pointers are flying, switching is out of style and more from the Celtics' pivotal Game 3 win over the 76ers in Philly.

items.headline: Nickeil Alexander-Walker named 2025-26 Kia NBA Most Improved Player
items.description: The Hawks guard is the fifth player in the last 35 seasons with a year-over-year jump of 11 or more points per game.

items.headline: Saint Paul Parks Conservancy & City Blossoms are Planting Seeds of Change in Local Communities
items.description: City Blossoms and the Saint Paul Parks and Recreation Conservancy are empowering youth through hands-on environmental programs that blend community building with sustainability.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Thunder-Suns Game 3
items.description: Turnovers, Devin Booker's scoring and Jalen Williams' fill-in will impact much of what happens in Game 3.

items.headline: Recap: 2026 NBA Playoffs, R1 | Road teams prevail to go ahead in first round series
items.description: Check out the best of Friday's 2026 NBA Playoffs action, featuring Celtics-76ers, Lakers-Rockets and Spurs-Blazers.

items.headline: Thunder and fans bond over travesty and triumph
items.description: Hartenstein never expected an Oklahoma City museum visit to change his life.

items.headline: Tennessee forward Nate Ament declares for NBA draft
items.description: Tennessee's Nate Ament entered the NBA Draft after one season in college.

items.headline: Star freshmen KU's Darryn Peterson, Duke's Cameron Boozer declare for NBA Draft
items.description: The Jayhawks' standout guard averaged 20.2 ppg and is considered one of the top prospects in the 2026 Draft class.

items.headline: Play NBA Pick'Em Streak to the Finals!
items.description: Put your fandom to the test in NBA Pick'Em Streak to the Finals during the 2026 NBA Playoffs to win a trip to the NBA Finals.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Celtics-76ers Game 3
items.description: The Celtics and 76ers seem set to add to their playoff lore as the series moves to Philadelphia for the next two games.
